pattern.imageEvidence: craftsperson refinishing a wooden furniture piece in a tidy workshop with tools and finish samples
pattern.styleContract: Patient and tactile with material proof, real refinishing evidence, brass action accents, and a send-photo estimate strip as the signature move.

tagline: Furniture repair with grain, care, and receipts.

hero.title: GrainMend furniture refinishing hero image
hero.alt: A craftsperson refinishing a wooden furniture piece in a tidy workshop with sanding block, brush, clamps, and wood samples.

contact.serviceArea: Furniture refinishing, chair repair, table restoration, finish refreshes, small cabinet repair, heirloom care, photo estimates, and local pickup or drop-off guidance across the area

copy.heroTitle: Bring the piece back without losing its story.
copy.heroText: GrainMend repairs worn edges, tired finishes, wobbly joints, and beloved wood pieces with a practical photo estimate and a finish plan you can understand.
copy.introTitle: A good refinish respects the piece before it starts shining.
copy.introText: We look at wood type, finish condition, structural issues, sentimental value, timeline, and whether repair or full refinishing is the better path.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to send a furniture photo?
copy.quoteText: Send clear photos, dimensions, damage notes, and what you hope the piece becomes. We will reply with the likely repair path and next step.

services.title: Finish Refresh
services.text: Clean, scuff, tone, and protect pieces that need life back without a full strip-down.

services.title: Repair And Stabilize
services.text: Loose joints, worn edges, missing pulls, small veneer issues, and structural fixes before the finish work.

services.title: Full Refinish
services.text: A deeper reset for tables, chairs, dressers, and heirloom pieces that need a new finish plan.

process.title: Send the piece
process.text: Clear photos, dimensions, damage, finish goals, and any sentimental constraints help us triage.

process.title: Choose the repair path
process.text: We explain refresh, repair, or refinish options before quoting the next step.

process.title: Restore and care
process.text: The piece is repaired, finished, cured, and handed back with care notes.
